name: Context Graph Compressor
description_en: Compress a long conversation into a portable JSON context graph you can hand off to a new chat or another LLM when you're out of tokens.
description_zh: 把一段长对话压缩成可移植的 JSON 上下文图,token 用尽时可交接给新会话或另一个 LLM。
long_en: Captures the essential entities, decisions, and state of a session so a fresh chat can continue without re-reading the full history.
long_zh: 提炼会话中的关键实体、决策与状态,让新会话无需重读完整历史即可接续。
sec_note_en: Writes a context file locally from your conversation; review it before sharing, as it may contain sensitive details.
sec_note_zh: 从你的对话在本地生成上下文文件;分享前请审阅,其中可能含敏感信息。
